top_signals.title: Inside SpaceX and Elon Musk’s $75 billion IPO
top_signals.summary: SpaceX’s first day on the stock market transformed the startup into one of the world’s most-valuable public companies, handed buyers of the IPO a 19% return and turned its founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire. Ed Ludlow reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump name must be removed from Kennedy Center by Friday night as appeals court denies DOJ motion
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump had asked a federal appeals court to suspend a lower-court order that his name before removed from the performing arts center.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
